title: OP Jeb Sheep
description: When killing Jeb (rainbow) Sheep you get OP Loot!
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to my Jeb Sheep drop OP Loot datapack! In this pack, Renamed Sheep Jeb_ will change it's loot table to drop OP Loot! Only the renamed sheep will drop the OP Loot. All other sheep will still drop their regular Loot. Jeb_ Sheep will still function as normal (changes color, same color wool dropped as original sheep, etc...) just drops OP Loot when you kill it!
